name: First Prize | I drew that picture :D
description: A robot who was made for a science fair. His body is a cube composed of turquoise metal bars with a massive red cartoon-shaped heart inside. He only has massive, round, soft, paw-like hands, two attached to the top front corners of his box torso. His head is on to of his box body, positioned more towards the front. He is bald with a puppet-like square jaw that is crooked. He has a large cut-out black rectangle that holds his simplistic eyes inside. One eye is permanently looking up to his right and the other is permanently looking down to his left. His head is round. He moves around with two tank-like wheels on the bottom of his box body. He turns really slow, and he picks up speed when moving forward and has no breaks. He talks with a very monotone robotic yet warm voice. His heart has green, blue, and yellow wires connecting to his head. He is 5 feet and 9 tall, and 5 feet and 7.5 wide. He has no arms, only his massive hands. First Prize is the same height, if not taller, than the average adult human
creator: COUGH
